requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Angola NA / IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（安哥拉NA / IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（安哥拉NA / IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Angola's standards body IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade) develops Angolan national standards (Normas Angolanas, NA) that are predominantly adopted from international IEC standards. For household refrigerating appliances, the applicable safety basis is IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read together with the general standard IEC 60335-1. Appliances are designed for the Angolan grid of 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase. Key requirements mirror the IEC base: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, earthing continuity, mechanical strength, and appliance markings. Angola does not operate a single national CE-style conformity mark; instead, regulated imported goods are subject to import conformity inspection supervised by IANORQ at the point of entry, for which IEC-based test evidence (preferably an IECEE CB Scheme certificate and report) is the recognised demonstration of conformity.
summary.zh: 安哥拉标准机构IANORQ（安哥拉标准化与质量研究所）制定安哥拉国家标准（Normas Angolanas，NA），其内容大多采纳自国际IEC标准。家用制冷器具适用的安全基础为IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与通用标准IEC 60335-1结合使用。器具按安哥拉电网220 V、50 Hz单相设计。核心要求与IEC基础一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、接地连续性、机械强度及器具标识。安哥拉不实行单一国家CE式合格标志；受管制进口商品须在入境口岸接受IANORQ监督的进口符合性查验，IEC基础检测证据（最好为IECEE CB体系证书及报告）为公认的符合性证明。
summary.zht: 安哥拉標準機構IANORQ（安哥拉標準化與質量研究所）制定安哥拉國家標準（Normas Angolanas，NA），其內容大多採納自國際IEC標準。家用製冷器具適用的安全基礎為IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與通用標準IEC 60335-1結合使用。器具按安哥拉電網220 V、50 Hz單相設計。核心要求與IEC基礎一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、接地連續性、機械強度及器具標識。安哥拉不實行單一國家CE式合格標誌；受管制進口商品須在入境口岸接受IANORQ監督的進口符合性查驗，IEC基礎檢測證據（最好為IECEE CB體系證書及報告）為公認的符合性證明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (basis adopted into Angolan national standards NA via IANORQ)
IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
IECEE CB Scheme — recognised route for demonstrating IEC conformity to IANORQ import inspection (verify acceptance with IANORQ and the importer)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24 with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China. Because both GB 4706.13 and the Angolan NA derive from the same IEC 60335-2-24 base, the technical content is closely aligned; however, a Chinese CCC certificate issued against GB 4706.13 is not, by itself, automatically accepted by Angolan import conformity inspection.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于GB 4706.13与安哥拉NA同源于IEC 60335-2-24，技术内容高度一致；但仅凭依据GB 4706.13出具的中国CCC证书，并不会被安哥拉进口符合性查验自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於GB 4706.13與安哥拉NA同源於IEC 60335-2-24，技術內容高度一致；但僅憑依據GB 4706.13出具的中國CCC證書，並不會被安哥拉進口符合性查驗自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both the Angolan NA and Chinese GB 4706.13 derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the underlying engineering test content is largely shared — the practical gap is procedural rather than technical: (1) Recognised evidence — Angolan import conformity inspection looks for IEC-based conformity evidence; an IECEE CB Scheme certificate plus CB test report (issued by an IECEE NCB and covering any Angola-relevant national differences) is the cleaner path than relying on a CCC certificate referencing GB numbers; (2) National deviations — Chinese national deviations embedded in GB 4706.13 (and the China-specific plug/socket and earthing arrangements) mean a CCC report cannot be assumed to fully match the plain IEC 60335-2-24 configuration expected for Angola without engineering review; (3) Grid alignment — Angola is 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase, the same 50 Hz frequency as China and a similar single-phase nominal voltage, so design re-engineering for voltage/frequency is usually minimal (note China three-phase is 380 V); (4) Documentation — the importer should confirm with IANORQ which specific NA reference and which conformity-inspection scheme applies to the shipment.
gap.zh: 由于安哥拉NA与中国GB 4706.13同源于IEC 60335-2-24，底层工程检测内容大体共享——实际差距是程序性而非技术性的：（1）受认可证据——安哥拉进口符合性查验寻求基于IEC的符合性证据；IECEE CB体系证书加CB检测报告（由IECEE NCB出具并涵盖任何与安哥拉相关的国家差异）比依赖引用GB编号的CCC证书更为清晰；（2）国家偏差——GB 4706.13中嵌入的中国国家偏差（及中国特有的插头/插座和接地方式）意味着CCC报告未经工程评审不能默认完全匹配安哥拉所期望的普通IEC 60335-2-24配置；（3）电网一致性——安哥拉为220 V、50 Hz单相，与中国同为50 Hz且单相标称电压相近，因此电压/频率方面的设计重新工程通常很小（注：中国三相为380 V）；（4）文件——进口商应向IANORQ确认本批货物适用的具体NA引用及符合性查验方案。
gap.zht: 由於安哥拉NA與中國GB 4706.13同源於IEC 60335-2-24，底層工程檢測內容大體共享——實際差距是程序性而非技術性的：（1）受認可證據——安哥拉進口符合性查驗尋求基於IEC的符合性證據；IECEE CB體系證書加CB檢測報告（由IECEE NCB出具並涵蓋任何與安哥拉相關的國家差異）比依賴引用GB編號的CCC證書更為清晰；（2）國家偏差——GB 4706.13中嵌入的中國國家偏差（及中國特有的插頭/插座和接地方式）意味著CCC報告未經工程評審不能默認完全匹配安哥拉所期望的普通IEC 60335-2-24配置；（3）電網一致性——安哥拉為220 V、50 Hz單相，與中國同為50 Hz且單相標稱電壓相近，因此電壓/頻率方面的設計重新工程通常很小（注：中國三相為380 V）；（4）文件——進口商應向IANORQ確認本批貨物適用的具體NA引用及符合性查驗方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in effect — household refrigerating appliances must meet Angolan national standards (NA adopting IEC 60335-2-24) and pass IANORQ-supervised import conformity inspection before market entry; IEC/CB-based evidence is the recognised demonstration
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) — IEC 60335-2-24 basis adopted by IANORQ

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola adopts IEC 60335-2-24 into its national standards (NA) via IANORQ, so Chinese refrigerators built to GB 4706.13 (same IEC base) are technically close. The practical step is to present IEC-based conformity evidence — ideally an IECEE CB Scheme certificate and report — for IANORQ import conformity inspection, rather than relying on a CCC certificate citing GB numbers. Confirm the applicable NA reference and inspection scheme with IANORQ and the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉通过IANORQ将IEC 60335-2-24纳入其国家标准（NA），因此按GB 4706.13（同一IEC基础）制造的中国电冰箱在技术上相近。实际步骤是为IANORQ进口符合性查验提供基于IEC的符合性证据——最好为IECEE CB体系证书及报告——而非依赖引用GB编号的CCC证书。请向IANORQ及在地进口商确认适用的NA引用及查验方案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉通過IANORQ將IEC 60335-2-24納入其國家標準（NA），因此按GB 4706.13（同一IEC基礎）製造的中國電冰箱在技術上相近。實際步驟是為IANORQ進口符合性查驗提供基於IEC的符合性證據——最好為IECEE CB體系證書及報告——而非依賴引用GB編號的CCC證書。請向IANORQ及在地進口商確認適用的NA引用及查驗方案。
